prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `b7999b51`.
codex_response:
Implemented `b7999b51` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: group all non-background cells by color, measure each color’s total vertical span in the input, sort colors by decreasing span, and output one top-filled column per color. I used the Opus hint and discarded the Sonnet hint because it misframed the task as a side-view projection; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7999b51/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed.

The generator matches the task family by building sparse zero-background inputs with two separated bands of wide overlapping rectangles, so the visible color spans drive the same compact bar-chart output as the official examples. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced 1000 examples, and generated verification passed `1000/1000`.

Task package files: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7999b51/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7999b51/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7999b51/generator.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_b7999b51/notes.md).

Generated artifacts: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7999b51/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7999b51/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7999b51/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7999b51/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/b7999b51/previews/preview_03.png).
